---
title: 'M07-R Data Types-Principle'
author: "Jae Jung"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---



```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(nycflights13) # date-time data
library(gapminder)
library(Lahman)
library(lubridate)
library(glue)
```


# Scalar


```{r}
testScore <- 86
class(testScore)
```
